nasb.text: The proud have hidden a trap for me, and cords; They have spread a net by the wayside; They have set snares for me. Selah.

esv.text: The arrogant have hidden a trap for me, and with cords they have spread a net; beside the way they have set snares for me. Selah

cnv.text: 驕傲的人暗中布下陷阱害我， 他們在路旁張開繩索作網， 設下圈套陷害我。

ccb.text: 傲慢人在我的路上暗设网罗， 布下圈套，挖了陷阱。（细拉）

csbs.text: 傲慢者为我暗设网罗和绳索， 他们在路旁张开网，为我摆设陷阱。细拉
